contentBlocks.original:
अतुलितबलधामं हेमशैलाभदेहं
दनुजवनकृशानुं ज्ञानिनामग्रगण्यम् ।
सकलगुणनिधानं वानराणामधीशं
रघुपतिप्रियभक्तं वातात्मजं नमामि ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
atulitabaladhāmaṃ hemaśailābhadehaṃ
danujavanakṛśānuṃ jñānināmagragaṇyam .
sakalaguṇanidhānaṃ vānarāṇāmadhīśaṃ
raghupatipriyabhaktaṃ vātātmajaṃ namāmi ..
contentBlocks.translation: Salutations to Sri Hanuman, who is an abode of unparallel power, and whose huge body is like a golden mountain, who is like a raging fire over the forest of demons, and the foremost among the Jnanis (the wise ones), who is a storehouse of all good qualities and the master of the monkeys, who is a dear devotee of Raghupati (Sri Rama) and the son of Vayudeva; I salute Sri Hanuman.
contentBlocks.meanings: अतुलितबलधामं (atulitabaladhāmaṃ) – abode of unparalleled power (atulita:unparalleled | bala:power | dhāmaṃ:abode); हेमशैलाभदेहं (hemaśailābhadehaṃ) – body like a golden mountain (hema:golden | śaila:mountain | ābha:like | dehaṃ:body); दनुजवनकृशानुं (danujavanakṛśānuṃ) – fire over the forest of demons (danuja:demon | vana:forest | kṛśānuṃ:fire); ज्ञानिनामग्रगण्यम् (jñānināmagragaṇyam) – foremost among the wise (jñāninām:of the wise | agra:foremost | gaṇyam:considered); सकलगुणनिधानं (sakalaguṇanidhānaṃ) – storehouse of all good qualities (sakala:all | guṇa:qualities | nidhānaṃ:storehouse); वानराणामधीशं (vānarāṇāmadhīśaṃ) – master of the monkeys (vānarāṇām:of the monkeys | adhīśaṃ:master); रघुपतिप्रियभक्तं (raghupatipriyabhaktaṃ) – dear devotee of Raghupati (raghupati:Raghupati | priya:dear | bhaktaṃ:devotee); वातात्मजं (vātātmajaṃ) – son of Vayu (vāta:Vayu | ātmajaṃ:son); नमामि (namāmi) – I salute;
